task_intents: prioritizing tasks from high to low
example_tasks: Sort database records by performance metrics
Identify areas to reduce monthly subscription costs
Analyze downward trend in website traffic
Prioritize backlog items by business value
Create a step-down transition plan for legacy system
Rank vendor proposals based on evaluation criteria
Optimize memory usage of background workers
Draft budget reduction proposal for Q3

reasoning: The icon clearly depicts a descending bar chart or step-down pattern. This makes it highly suitable for tasks involving sorting, prioritizing, analyzing downward trends, or planning budget/resource reductions.
